final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original product shot for a premium skincare serum, suitable for Tmall homepage banner use.

Style/medium: high-end beauty product photography, editorial cosmetic campaign aesthetic, photorealistic
Composition: centered floating serum bottle, macro product shot with surrounding elements, shallow depth of field
Subject: glass serum bottle with dropper cap, elegant minimalist packaging, suspended mid-air
Scene/backdrop: soft gradient background transitioning from blush pink to lavender purple, floating pink petals and water droplets scattered around the bottle
Lighting/mood: soft diffused studio lighting, gentle rim light on bottle edges, ethereal and luxurious atmosphere
Color palette: blush pink as primary, lavender purple as secondary, clear water droplets as accent, rose gold or silver packaging highlights
Materials/textures: smooth glass bottle surface with subtle reflections, delicate silk-like petals, crystal-clear water droplets with caustics
Constraints: must read clearly at banner scale (Tmall homepage), product must remain focal point, text-safe area on left or right third
Avoid: harsh shadows, cluttered composition, plastic-looking textures, over-saturated colors, generic stock photo aesthetic, watermark
